articles.title: Orchard Spring
articles.author: Ing Smith
articles.complete_text:
Blossom of apple, and blossom of plum
Drift on the still air together
Till brilliance of wings like an indigo cry
Breaks the languor of white lace weather.

A moment to hold in the hand like a shell—
A time of renewal, a time of farewell.
articles.notes: Complete standalone poem with clear title and author attribution

misc_summary: This file contains primarily Relief Society Magazine masthead/board information, table of contents for April 1952 issue, subscription and publishing details, advertisements for various products (nightgowns, pianos, organs, etc.), Notes From the Field section with photographs and reports of Relief Society activities from various locations, author biographical information, reader letters, and book advertisements. The bulk is legitimate miscellaneous magazine content rather than standalone articles.
